title: Lateral Movement Attempt Detected
description: Detects lateral movement including SSH hopping between servers and remote service exploitation.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT QIDNAME(qid) as EventName, sourceIP, destinationIP, username, LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) as LogSource, payload, starttime FROM events WHERE LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) ILIKE '%LinuxServer%' AND (payload ILIKE '%StrictHostKeyChecking%' OR (payload ILIKE '%scp%' AND payload ILIKE '%root@%') OR (payload ILIKE '%ssh%' AND payload ILIKE '%192.168.%')) ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 300 SECONDS
